title: Galt Toys, Magic Puzzle - Fairy Palace, Magic Jigsaw Puzzle, Ages 4 Years Plus
features: An exciting 50-piece puzzle with 15 rub-and-reveal patches
Children will enjoy making this fun puzzle, then rubbing the patches of heat sensitive ink to discover what is hidden underneath
The hidden pictures will appear and then disappear
description: From the manufacturer Fairy Palace Magic Puzzle Exciting 50-piece puzzle with 15 magic patches. One of a range of puzzles featuring cross sections of a Fairy Palace, Haunted House, Pirate Ship and Castle. Children will enjoy making these fascinating scenes, then rubbing the heat sensitive ink to discover what is hidden beneath. Not suitable for children under 36 months
